about.title: JIKJI Labs' Vision and Core Business Areas
about.subtitle: Reducing the burden of building and operating AI infrastructure, allowing customers to fully focus on AI innovation.
about.desc1: The pace of AI industry development is faster than ever. Many companies are leveraging AI technology to innovate productivity and strengthen competitiveness. Companies need more powerful computing power and flexible infrastructure. However, the biggest practical barrier for companies trying to apply AI technology to their business is the difficulty of building and operating AI infrastructure.
about.desc2: JIKJI Labs provides AI infrastructure solutions that can immediately respond to the rapidly changing AI environment. We present a direction for customers to build and utilize a computing environment that can be immediately expanded in line with the latest AI trends, and we aim to be the infrastructure partner that most strongly supports customers' AI innovation.
about.heritage_desc: IT JIKJI Labs inherits that spirit, designing a new 'printing press' for the digital age. We are a group of digital craftsmen who connect humanity's thoughts most quickly, accurately, and meaningfully through technology.
about.fullstack_title: From Data Center to AI Full Stack Services
about.fullstack_desc: Infrastructure-native AI Full Stack company. We provide private isolation, SLA guarantees, transparent observability, and robust security on a single platform.

path.title: Our Path
path.subtitle: Since its inception in 1999, N3N has accumulated video intelligence technology, data structuring and visualization technology, patents and experience. Based on this, we provide solutions that innovatively address the different demands of various industries.

video.title: Analyzes large-scale video data in real-time through advanced Vision AI technology and proprietary algorithms, providing insights optimized for industrial sites.
video.subtitle: We provide vivid insights from the field.

features.title: VIDEO INTELLIGENCE
features.desc:
POD (Pixel On Demand)
VIDEO INTELLIGENCE ENGINE
RDS(Remote Desktop System)
features.detail: The core engine for real-time pixel-level collection and analysis of video data. Pixel On Demand selectively transmits only the required pixels, optimizing bandwidth.

features.title: DATA INTELLIGENCE
features.detail: Dynamically structures complex topological data from industrial sites to automate insight generation.

features.title: OPERATION INTELLIGENCE
features.desc:
SOP (Standard Operation Procedure)
VIDEO INTELLIGENCE ENGINE
RDS(Remote Desktop System)
features.detail: AI algorithms integrated with Standard Operating Procedures (SOP) to support anomaly detection and automated response.

features.title: DATA VISUALIZATION
features.desc:
LOCATION BASED VISUALIZATION
MULTI LAYER & ZOOMABLE UI
DIGITAL TIME-SPACE CREATION
features.detail: Intuitively visualizes field data through location-based multi-layer UI and digital spatiotemporal reconstruction technology.

features.title: SMART IoT SOLUTIONS
features.desc:
SMART SENSOR FUSION
IoT DEVICE MANAGEMENT
EDGE COMPUTING GATEWAY
features.detail: Integrates and manages diverse IoT sensor data, processing field data in real-time through edge computing.

aidc.title: JIKJI Labs AI DC #1
aidc.badge: Completion planned Q3 2027 · Ultra-fast data hub for the AI era
aidc.subtitle: State-of-the-art PMDC (Purpose-Built Modular Data Center) designed for AI

specs.title: Building Overview
specs.desc:
Site: 575m² (174 pyeong)
Floor area: 2,280m² (690 pyeong)

Scale: 5F above, 1F below ground

specs.title: Power Capacity
specs.desc:
Total power: 4MW
IT power: 2.72MW
---
**Racks: 40kW × 60ea, 16kW × 20ea
10 modules per rack
Per module: 400kW×6, 160kW×2

specs.title: Facility Overview
specs.desc:
Internal modular design
• Server room
• Electrical room
• Generator: outdoor integrated or ESS
• UPS room, battery room
• Office, corridor, lobby, restroom

specs.title: Features
specs.desc:
Availability Model
• Power: redundant (primary + standby)
• Distribution: redundant, UPS 5MW dual
• Cooling: N+1 (chiller N+1, FCU N+1)

PUE estimate: 1.1 ~ 1.3
